zh.Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特米德頌 諾頓
zh.Christchurch Priory Churchyard, Christch: 英國英格蘭多瑟特可利斯丘其可利斯丘其 普利奧利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzHerbert於大約1340年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Reynold FitzHerbert30歲，母親Joan Hakeluyt27歲。她於1365年之前與Sir Thomas West在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1395年9月1日之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特可利斯丘其可利斯丘其 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzHerbert于大约1340年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Reynold FitzHerbert30岁，母亲Joan Hakeluyt27岁。她于1365年之前与Sir Thomas West在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1395年9月1日之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特可利斯丘其可利斯丘其 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzHerbert was born about 1340, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Reynold FitzHerbert, was 30 and her mother, Joan Hakeluyt, was 27. She married Sir Thomas West before 1365, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 1 September 1395, in her hometown, and was buried in Christchurch Priory, Christchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir Thomas West avant 1365, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1 septembre 1395, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Christchurch Priory, Christchurch, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas West prima del 1365, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ko.Christchurch Priory Churchyard, Christch: 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 크리스트c후르치 크리스트c후르치 프리오리
ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzHerbert(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reynold FitzHerbert(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Hakeluyt(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1365년 이전 영국 데폰에서 Sir Thomas West(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 9월 1일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 크리스트c후르치 크리스트c후르치 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzHerbert nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reynold FitzHerbert, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hakeluyt, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas West antes 1365, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1 de setembro de 1395, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Christchurch Priory, Christchurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Christchurch Priory Churchyard, Christch: крисчурч приори, крисчурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzHerbert родилась около 1340 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reynold FitzHerbert было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hakeluyt, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas West перед 1365 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1 сентябрь 1395 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности крисчурч приори, крисчурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
